trigger: Primary spine below 100k or source/visual gaps remain
deliverables: Resolve word-count map, Chapter 12 structure, source-density critical chapters, 100-exhibit readiness, unsupported claims, and PDF render QA
success_gate: Hard constraints pass or are explicitly quarantined
blockers: Current I-0166 and I-0164 audits show unresolved launch blockers.

trigger: Book can be described truthfully in one paragraph
deliverables: Final title/subtitle, jacket copy, category paths, keywords, author bio, cover brief, comp-title sheet
success_gate: Reader-test protocol does not reject title/subtitle and KDP metadata constraints pass
blockers: Subtitle may be too long for some readers; cover must not imitate comps.

deliverables: ARC PDF/EPUB, errata form, reviewer segmentation, technical fact-check list, launch landing page
success_gate: No known unsupported factual claims in ARC; no private-use visual rights surprises
blockers: Heavy visuals may affect EPUB/file-size/pricing and review readability.

deliverables: 30+ serious early-reader asks, 10 technical reviewers, 10 book-world/editorial readers, 5 hardware/infrastructure readers
success_gate: Enough corrections/blurb candidates without compromising source truth
blockers: KDP description cannot include reviews/testimonials; blurbs belong on cover/landing page where allowed.

trigger: Manuscript stable enough to hit KDP deadlines
deliverables: Decision memo: eBook preorder vs direct launch; final price test; final category paths
success_gate: If preorder: final manuscript can be submitted safely more than 72 hours before release; otherwise no preorder
blockers: S-0180 penalty risk if delayed/cancelled; paperbacks are release-date scheduling, not preorder.

deliverables: Ebook, paperback/hardcover if ready, launch essay, podcast/newsletter pitches, Goodreads/Author Central, category/keyword verification
success_gate: Listing metadata matches book, no pricing/availability language in description, no category manipulation
blockers: Amazon review timing, print proof delays, file-review delays, and category drift.

deliverables: Price tests, category refinement, ad copy tests, excerpt/landing-page updates, paperback/hardcover adjustments
success_gate: Changes are based on data and preserve truth/positioning
blockers: Do not chase bestseller badges with irrelevant categories or misleading keywords.
